nodes.label:
CannaMax
/ HARK
nodes.desc: The cultivation OS. Drift detection, change feed, real-time pH/EC/flow per zone. Everything else feeds into this.
nodes.tech: TypeScript · Express 5 · Drizzle · Zod · Alexandria adapters · SQLite
nodes.notes: 2026-05-24: Apply Infinium to All button shipped — one tap snapshots live Infinium readings into all 24 rooms at once. Env timestamps on every tile. Fixed env_readings_source_check DB constraint (infinium-snapshot was missing). Anderson tab live via Fluxuum/facility-tracker integration. 2026-05-29: AB1 chart fix shipped (src/windowing.ts multi-run assignment — fixed empty-chart bug from operator's nested manual catch-runs). 2026-05-30: fluxuum-anderson-drift + lights-on-too-cold detectors both live; main branch caught back up to production via two clean merges. 2026-06-02: dual-backend DB client landed (commit 61ba220) — real PostgreSQL via DATABASE_URL when set, PGlite fallback. Ingredient recon-report updated to reflect 29→13 canonical ingredient cleanup.

nodes.label:
Facility
Tracker
nodes.desc: Room state dashboard. OCR parsing, env monitoring, runoff chemistry, change events feed. Pi-hosted.
nodes.tech: React 18 · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · Claude Vision · pnpm monorepo
nodes.notes: 2026-05-24: Apply Infinium to All button added to INFINIUM tab — fills all 24 room env tiles from live Infinium reads in one tap. 2026-05-30: isLightsOn now per-room — AB2+EF4 on new :50 photoperiod, other 22 rooms still on :30. Same deploy brought D14-42=1150W wattage tier live (after 11 days stale on Pi).

nodes.label:
Recipe
Book
nodes.desc: Grow recipe hub. Cycle tracking, arc charts, drift detection, field notes. Scrapes live controller data.
nodes.tech: Python · Flask · SQLite · WebSocket · OpenAI (optional)
nodes.notes: 2026-05-30: env program update — photoperiod widened (00:00-11:50 main, +5min UC), D14-42 = 1150W (new tier above 1000W), W7 split (D42 still 1150W, D43 steps down to 1000W). Pi recipe-book is plain-copied files (NOT a git checkout) — edits go via scp + service restart. 2026-06-01-02: HydroZ campus-wide trial complete; Hydro z stub (id=30) consolidated into canonical HydroZ (id=16, GH port 11 / AB port 15 / EF port 16). 29→13 canonical ingredients — Drip A NPK 15-0-0 confirmed, shared name_normalize.py ingester, 9 unit tests. 2026-06-03-04: Drip vendor sheets live for A/B/C/D — ingredient modal restructured into 'Our Program' + 'Vendor Sheet' tabs. 2026-06-04: Day 0 = Load day fixed (removed +1 offset from cycle_day calc). Controller-drift UI removed (room cards + modal banner + 'Actually Running'). Collapsible changelog — day-based grouping, single-open accordion. Deployed to both anderson-hub + hub-backup via redeploy.sh.

nodes.label:
Fluxuum
Logger
nodes.desc: Irrigation telemetry. pH/EC/flow/gal per zone, 136 reads/hr. Anomaly alerts via Resend email. v5 ESM rewrite (Alexandria-native) is now the sole production poller on anderson-hub (v4.3 stopped 2026-06-04).
nodes.tech: TypeScript · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · React · Resend · OpenAI · pnpm monorepo
nodes.notes: 2026-05-30: v5 Alexandria-native ESM rewrite of poller landed on origin/main (commits 17d8b45 plan, 4673bd9 impl, a8748df heartbeat-fix). 12/12 golden byte-equivalence tests green. 2026-06-04: v4.3 poller stopped + disabled; fluxuum-poller-shadow (v5) is now the sole production poller on anderson-hub. Temp probe Phase 1+2 shipped (branch feature/temp-probe): anderson_probe_readings table created, schema + extractor in source (commit 6645990); DRY_RUN=1 (logs only, no DB writes yet). /api/runs/latest-by-building widget route recovered after it went missing from new bundle (commit ed282b9). /api/anderson-probe/import endpoint in source but old bundle still rolled back — pending new bundle SCP to flip DRY_RUN=0.

nodes.label: Alexandria
nodes.desc: Controller adapter abstraction. ObservationOnlyMarker enforces read-only. Supports Anderson, Infinium, TrolMaster, Argus, and more. 2026-05-30: openRunDataStream() added — continuous /rundata/ws streaming for live pollers.
nodes.tech: TypeScript ESM · Zero runtime deps · pnpm monorepo · 5 packages
nodes.notes: 2026-05-30: openRunDataStream() added to adapter-he-anderson — mirrors the existing openPreviousRunStream() pattern (queue/waiters/close handling) but for the LIVE /rundata/ws endpoint (was one-shot fetchRunData only). 7-case test suite covers auth gate, in-order delivery, deferred-arrival waiter, caller-close, server-close, login failure, WS handshake failure. Live smoke green against all 3 facility controllers (AB/EF/GH). Packaged as .tgz for Pi-side install. On origin/main.

Auto-creates today's S2 session if missing, opens new-incident form pre-filled with the description from a Drift Report transcript. Site is now the destination of the voice pipeline. Live commits: e3c0445 (draftHandler), ff2d07f (App+IncidentPage wiring). Spec doc inside the repo.

nodes.label:
Raspberry Pi
(anderson-hub)
nodes.desc: Anderson-hub Pi is the production primary again as of 2026-05-28 22:31 PT (identity-only restore on new microSD after the 5/27 SD-card death; 51-sec failover-back from hub-backup). Hosts Fluxuum:3001, Facility-Tracker:8080, recipe-book:5050, CannaMax:3031, FRD:3035, infinium-bridge. At facility LAN; reaches 10.10.13.x controllers directly. Always-on.
nodes.tech: Pi 5 · 8GB · Pi OS 64-bit · systemd · Tailscale Serve · PostgreSQL 17 · Node 24 · infinium-bridge
nodes.notes: 2026-05-30: drift detector cron enabled (*/15 min, writes change_events). FT web/ rsync deploy 08:44 PT brought isLightsOn AB2+EF4 fix + D14-42=1150W wattage update live. 2026-05-28 22:31 PT: primary flipped BACK to anderson-hub; hub-backup now standby with 5-min sync. Off-site backup syncs hourly to Neon Postgres. 2026-06-04: v4.3 poller stopped + disabled; fluxuum-poller-shadow (v5) is now sole production poller. anderson_probe_readings table created (empty; DRY_RUN=1). New API bundle built (feature/temp-probe) with recovered widget route + probe endpoint; bundle deployed to service. facility-watch now on anderson-hub (was hub-backup).

Mesh

nodes.label:
Neon
(HARK)
nodes.desc: Pi data mirrored to Neon cloud Postgres hourly. 6 tables live: recipes, recipe_phases, recipe_doses, runoff_readings, cycles, fluxuum_runs. Pi is source of truth; Neon is off-site backup + cloud-queryable.

First pass: 10 recipes, 46 phases, 345 doses, 335 runoff readings, 25 cycles, 1403 fluxuum_runs. 10-day rolling window for fluxuum_runs; all history for cycles/recipes. Duplicate project raspy-bar-42114503 deleted.

nodes.label: facility-watch
nodes.desc: Env smoke alarm inside CannaMax. 30s tick, 24 rooms, 2 detectors (high_temp 90°F, high_co2 3000ppm). Fires events to /events page + ntfy push. Lives on anderson-hub.
nodes.tech: TypeScript · Drizzle · Postgres facility_events table · pure-function detectors · ntfy.sh push
nodes.notes: 2026-05-28: enabled (was silently off via systemd override). Fire+clear path verified end-to-end with AB6 test. Source mirrored from hub-backup back to git (commit 912818c) — was hand-edited on Pi with no version tracking. Master switch: FACILITY_WATCH=on in /home/pi/cannamax/demo/runoff-loader/.env. Push topic: gacx-power-y2k7q9pmx3. 2026-06-01: lights_out_inferred + lights_on_too_cold stripped from all 24 rooms (CannaMax commit aa7e424). Only high_temp + high_co2 remain active. lights_on_too_cold lives as standalone detector node.

nodes.label: ntfy.sh
nodes.desc: Phone push backbone. Public ntfy.sh — topic-per-purpose. Topic gacx-power-y2k7q9pmx3 receives facility-watch env alerts.
nodes.tech: ntfy.sh (free public) · HTTPS · Android ntfy app
nodes.notes: 2026-05-28: confirmed receiving facility-watch high_temp alerts (AB6 fire test).

nodes.label:
Raspberry Pi
(hub-backup)
nodes.desc: Standby/mesh-peer Pi at Max's condo (home WiFi, no direct controller access). Full mirror of anderson-hub services; flipped to primary on 5/27 during anderson-hub SD-card death and ran production for ~24h. Flipped back to standby 5/28 22:31 PT. Watcher + 5-min sync from anderson-hub keep it warm.
nodes.tech: Pi 5 · 8GB · Pi OS 64-bit · systemd · Tailscale · PostgreSQL 17 · Node 24
nodes.notes: Spare microSD complete 2026-05-29 05:30 PT — services enabled but stopped. Hosts widget-URL nginx proxy + Tailscale Funnel to preserve public URLs while anderson-hub is primary. Promote procedure documented in memory. 2026-06-04: v5 fluxuum-poller-shadow code synced from anderson-hub and deployed; new API bundle (feature/temp-probe) deployed; systemd unit installed + daemon reloaded — service not yet enabled+started (session paused before final step). v4 poller service still present.

nodes.label:
Fluxuum-Anderson
Drift Detector
nodes.desc: Pulls Anderson /previousrun directly (in-memory, no anderson-backfill dependency), compares against fluxuum_runs rows. Emits change_events when Fluxuum's aggregation creates phantom envelope runs, drops tail runs, or drifts >30s from Anderson endpoints. 15-min cron on anderson-hub.
nodes.tech: TypeScript · pure compareRuns() + I/O wrapper · sha256 dedup by [room,kind,15min-bucket]
nodes.notes: Shipped 2026-05-30 ~03:30 PT (178 events in backlog). Cron enabled 2026-05-30 ~08:18 PT. Caught AB1 phantom envelope on 5/28 + 5/29 — same incident the lights-on-too-cold detector caught from a different angle (overnight hallway breaker trip, Lando confirmed).

nodes.label:
Lights-On
Too Cold
nodes.desc: During scheduled lights-on, fires when actual temp is >10F below the recipe-book phase target for >=2 ticks. Catches HVAC failures, breaker trips, sensor faults. Per-room schedule awareness (S1 vs S2; AB2+EF4 on the new :50 photoperiod).
nodes.tech: TypeScript · pure detector + recipe-book phase lookup · change_events writer
nodes.notes: Shipped 2026-05-30 ~03:50 PT (other agent). Fired AB1 03:57:58 PT (66.3F vs 77F D17 W3 target) within hours of going live — same overnight as fluxuum-anderson-drift's AB1 phantom catch. Two orthogonal signals, one physical cause.

nodes.label:
Fluxuum Poller
Shadow (v5)
nodes.desc: v5 Alexandria-native poller — now the sole production poller on anderson-hub (v4.3 stopped 2026-06-04). 'Shadow' in name is legacy from pre-promotion staging. Also deployed to hub-backup (unit installed, not yet started).
nodes.tech: Node 22 ESM · @alexandria/adapter-he-anderson via file:.tgz · systemd unit fluxuum-poller-shadow.service · Pi-side install
nodes.notes: Started 2026-05-30 04:59 PDT as shadow alongside v4. 11/11 byte-identical pairs green. 2026-06-04: v4.3 stopped + disabled; fluxuum-poller-shadow promoted to sole production poller on anderson-hub. Temperature probe extractor runs in DRY_RUN=1 mode (logs readings, no DB writes). hub-backup: code + unit installed (obs 9041, 9045), systemd daemon reloaded, service not yet enabled+started (session paused). Rollback = sudo systemctl start fluxuum-poller (v4.3 code still at /home/pi/fluxuum-poller/).
